Class Hunting

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.Abstract.Card
it.polimi.Game.Elements.Tribe
it.polimi.Abstract.Event
it.polimi.Events.Hunting
public class Hunting extends Event
Represents a Hunting event in the game Mesos. This event grants food and prestige points to players based on the number of Hunter characters in their tribe. It scales according to the specific multipliers defined for the event instance.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • Hunting

      public Hunting(Era era, Position position, int food, int points)
      Constructs a Hunting event with specified era, position, and reward values.
      Parameters:
      era - The Era in which this event occurs.
      position - The Position of the event card.
      food - The amount of food granted per Hunter owned by the player.
      points - The amount of prestige points granted per Hunter owned by the player.

  • Method Details

    • getFood

      public int getFood()
      Returns the food reward multiplier per Hunter.
      Returns:
      The food multiplier value.

    • getPoints

      public int getPoints()
      Returns the prestige point reward multiplier per Hunter.
      Returns:
      The points multiplier value.

    • applyEffect

      public void applyEffect(EventContext context)
      Applies the hunting effect to every player within the provided event context. For each player, the number of characters of type CharacterType.HUNTER is counted, and the rewards are distributed accordingly.
      Specified by:
      applyEffect in class Event
      Parameters:
      context - The EventContext containing the list of players to process.
